content_body: The cabin was conveniently located to restaurants, downtown, and a grocery store. The directions were perfect and easy to follow. We were amazed at how well stocked it was, down to toiletry items on every bed with fresh towels. There was nothing we needed during our stay that wasn't there, as board games were provided, a coffee pot, towels for the hot tub, and firewood along side the pit. All we needed to take was clothes and food for a wonderful weekend. The view to the water from the porch was incredible, and we took a wonderful walk along the tracks and were surprised by the Blue Ridge railroad. So beautiful to have coffee on the deck on the crisp mornings and watch the sunrise. Would definitely stay here again and will share with friends.
title: Would Definitely Stay Here Again
